violations.text: Strainer observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

Raw animal foods (shell eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods in the 2-door reach-in. Raw animal foods must be stored below raw ready-to-eat food during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025
Splashguard is needed between the prep sink and mop sink to prevent contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2024

Individual cutting boards are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2024

The condensate from the ice machine is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Ice machine must drain into a drain with a proper air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2024
The door to the restroom is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2024
